data.body:
13-16. Brosnan-era 007 Films

Going into these films mostly for supplemental context for the games I grew up with and loved. All are fun action blockbusters, with escalating buffoonery throughout that I find (mostly) charming.

Really wish we got an Alpha Protocol-like Bond game for this era.
